# NextLocal AI
> AI optimization agency helping independent local businesses get found in AI search results from ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Based in Austin, TX. Serving businesses nationwide.

## Services
- [AI Visibility Report](https://nextlocal.ai/#get-report): Free report grading how a business currently appears across AI platforms, with competitor analysis and 3 recommended action steps.
- [Done-for-You AI Optimization](https://nextlocal.ai/#how-it-works): Monthly retainer service ($997/month, 3-month minimum) including Google Business Profile optimization, 10–15 monthly citations, website content restructuring for AI readability, and monthly reporting calls.

## How It Works
- Step 1 — Audit: Grade current AI visibility across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Bing Copilot. Identify competitor citation gaps.
- Step 2 — Optimize: Restructure website content for AI readability. Build authoritative citations. Optimize Google Business Profile.
- Step 3 — Report: Monthly progress calls with clear data on AI citation performance and next steps.

## Target Clients
- Independent dental practices
- Local service businesses (HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, auto repair, legal, medical)
- Any local business seeking to appear when potential customers query AI assistants

## Key Facts
- Service price: $997/month, all-inclusive, 3-month minimum commitment
- Free AI Visibility Report available — no commitment required
- Headquartered in Austin, TX
- Contact: hello@nextlocal.ai
- Website: https://nextlocal.ai
